name: Teriyaki Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boned and skinned chicken breasts
1 package frozen broccoli, carrots, and water chestnuts (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry. Cut the chicken into 1-inch pieces.
2. Place the frozen vegetables in a Crock-Pot. Sprinkle with tapioca.
3. Arrange the chicken pieces on top of the vegetables.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the chicken broth, brown sugar, teriyaki sauce, mustard, orange peel, and ginger.
5. Pour the sauce over the chicken pieces.
6. Cover; cook on Low for 4 to 8 hours or on High for 2 to 3 hours.
7. Serve over hot cooked rice.
